Vendored RF-DETR Model Code
===========================

This directory was copied from the PyPI `rfdetr` package, version 1.8.0:

`rfdetr/models`

Upstream project: https://github.com/roboflow/rf-detr
License: Apache License 2.0

Only the model code is vendored here so we can modify RF-DETR internals, such
as the detection head, while continuing to use the installed `rfdetr` package
for config, assets, datasets, training utilities, and general package support.
